domain: Naked mole-rat eusocial caste — single queen + non-reproductive workers; worker autonomy suppressed by queen's presence; size-stratified worker labour; queen succession on death.
specific_mechanism: Active suppression of subordinate autonomy by single dominant; succession protocol on dominant failure; size-stratified non-reproductive class.
llm_application: EUSOCIAL-AGENT: multi-agent system with single coordinator that actively SUPPRESSES local worker autonomy (default = no act, no spawn). Workers run only with explicit signed delegation from coordinator. Workers are size-stratified (small = task-resolvers, large = domain-specialists). On coordinator failure, deterministic succession promotes a worker to coordinator with full delegation authority.
novelty_claim: Standard orchestrator-worker (LangGraph, CrewAI) gives workers local autonomy. SciAgent recursive hierarchy uses ensembles. AOrchestra unifies hierarchy as 4-tuple but doesn't enforce suppression. EUSOCIAL-AGENT's distinctive contribution is ACTIVE SUPPRESSION OF WORKER AUTONOMY by coordinator (workers cannot act on local reasoning without delegation signature) + formal SUCCESSION protocol on coordinator failure.
